product_overview: Casa del Sol Access Control is a web application for managing user registration, approval, and access recording through rotating QR codes. It supports public signup, admin review, authorized user scanning, and public QR display for kiosk use.
core_goals: Allow public users to register with personal information and identification upload
Let admins review, authorize, reject, and manage user access states
Enable authorized users to register entry and exit using QR scanning
Provide a public kiosk view of the current QR code
Show admins access logs, users inside, and live QR status

features.name: Session bootstrap and route protection
features.description: Loads the current session and sends users to the correct public, user, or admin area based on authentication and role.
user_flows: Open the root URL -> Wait for the session check to finish -> See the login page when unauthenticated
Open the root URL -> Wait for the session check to finish -> See the dashboard when authenticated as a non-admin user
Open the root URL -> Wait for the session check to finish -> See the admin panel when authenticated as an admin

features.name: Admin login
features.description: Lets seeded admin users sign in and reach the admin panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in the admin email -> Fill in the admin password -> Submit the login form -> See the admin panel
Navigate to /login -> Fill in the admin email -> Fill in an incorrect password -> Submit the login form -> See a safe Spanish error message -> Remain on the login page

features.name: Public registration
features.description: Allows non-admin users to create an account with required personal details and an identification image.
user_flows: Navigate to /registro -> Fill in the required personal information -> Select a public role -> Upload a PNG or JPG identification image -> Submit the registration form -> See the pending approval screen
Navigate to /registro -> Fill in a password shorter than 12 characters -> Attempt to submit the registration form -> See client-side validation rejection
Navigate to /registro -> Fill in an age outside the allowed range -> Attempt to submit the registration form -> See client-side validation rejection
Navigate to /registro -> Fill in an invalid phone number -> Attempt to submit the registration form -> See client-side validation rejection
Navigate to /registro -> Omit the identification image -> Attempt to submit the registration form -> See client-side validation rejection

features.name: Pending approval
features.description: Shows the status message for users whose registration is waiting for admin review.
user_flows: Navigate to /pendiente -> Read the pending approval message -> Return to the login page

features.name: User dashboard and profile
features.description: Shows authenticated users their authorization state, profile data, and access options.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View authorization status and profile details
Navigate to /dashboard -> When authorized, open the QR scan area
Navigate to /dashboard -> Log out -> See the login page
Navigate to /dashboard -> When unauthorized, see limited access status and no QR scanning controls

features.name: QR scan
features.description: Lets authorized users record entry and exit by entering or scanning a QR code.
user_flows: Navigate to /qr -> Choose entry -> Choose manual input mode -> Paste a valid QR code -> Submit the scan -> See a success message in Spanish
Navigate to /qr -> Choose exit -> Choose manual input mode -> Paste a valid QR code -> Submit the scan -> See a success message in Spanish
Navigate to /qr -> Choose entry or exit -> Choose camera mode -> Scan a QR code with the camera -> Submit the scan -> See the result message

features.name: Public kiosk QR
features.description: Displays the current QR code publicly without requiring authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /kiosko -> View the current QR code -> View the expiration time

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Provides admin tools for reviewing users, managing access, and viewing operational data.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Review system statistics
Navigate to /admin -> Open the pending users view -> Filter by role -> View a pending user's identification image -> Authorize the user
Navigate to /admin -> Open the pending users view -> Reject a pending user -> See the user removed from the pending list
Navigate to /admin -> Open the user search view -> Search by name or email -> Filter by role -> View matching users with their state and registration date

Navigate to /admin -> Open the user search view -> Search for an authorized user -> Choose to unauthorize the user -> Enter a reason of at least 10 characters -> Submit -> Search again -> Reauthorize the same user
Navigate to /admin -> Open the access logs view -> Select today's date -> View totals and individual access records
Navigate to /admin -> Open the users inside view -> Enter notes for manual exit -> Register a manual exit for a user -> See the user removed from the inside list
Navigate to /admin -> Open the QR display view -> View the current QR code and expiration time

routes.description: Redirects users to the dashboard route, which then enforces authentication.
Spanish login page for email and password authentication.
Public registration page for non-admin users with identification image upload.
Public kiosk route showing the current QR code.
Authenticated user dashboard with authorization status and QR access action.
Authenticated profile route showing registered user data.
Authorized user QR scan route for entry and exit.
Admin panel for stats, pending users, search, access logs, users inside, and QR display.

features.name: Session bootstrap and route protection
features.description: Loads the current profile using httpOnly cookies and redirects users based on authentication, role, and authorization state.
user_interactions: Wait for session check to finish.
See dashboard or admin panel when authenticated.

features.name: Admin login
features.description: Authenticates seeded admin credentials and redirects admins to the admin panel.
user_interactions: See safe error message for invalid credentials.

features.name: Public registration
features.description: Allows public non-admin users to register with personal details and an identification image.
user_interactions: Upload a PNG or JPG identification image.

features.name: Pending approval
features.description: Shows Spanish status copy for users awaiting admin approval.
user_interactions: Open pending route after registration or redirect.

features.name: User dashboard and profile
features.description: Shows authorization status, role, profile data, and QR access when allowed.
user_interactions: Navigate to QR scan when authorized.

features.name: QR scan
features.description: Allows authorized users to register entry or exit using camera or manual QR code entry.
user_interactions: Paste a QR code or scan with camera.

features.name: Public kiosk QR
features.description: Displays the current QR code without authentication for public kiosk screens.

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Provides administrative views for stats, pending users, user search, access logs, users inside, and QR display.
user_interactions: Search users by name or email.
Register manual exit for users inside.

known_limitations.issue: Camera QR scanning depends on browser camera permission and device availability.
known_limitations.impact: Automated tests should prefer manual QR code input unless camera mocking is configured.

known_limitations.issue: Some admin workflows require seed data such as pending users or authorized non-admin users.
known_limitations.impact: Tests that authorize, reject, unauthorize, reauthorize, or manual-exit users may need setup data through the backend.
